eventReminder.title: Your event starts soon
eventReminder.body: Your {eventLabel} from {locationName} starts in about 15 minutes.

waitlistPromotion.title: You're in
waitlistPromotion.body: A spot opened for your {eventLabel} from {locationName}.

waitlistOffer.title: A spot is available
waitlistOffer.body: You have a limited-time spot for your {eventLabel} from {locationName}.

waitlistOfferExpiring.title: Your spot is expiring
waitlistOfferExpiring.body: Confirm your {eventLabel} from {locationName} soon to keep the spot.

waitlistOfferExpired.title: Spot offer expired
waitlistOfferExpired.body: Your spot offer for the {eventLabel} from {locationName} has expired.

eventUpdated.title: Event details changed
eventUpdated.body: Check the latest time and meeting point for your {eventLabel}.

eventUpdate.title: Event update
eventUpdate.body: There is an update for your {eventLabel} from {locationName}.

eventCompanionReady.title: Your event companion is ready
eventCompanionReady.body: Open the live guide for your {eventLabel} from {locationName}.
